reading: The self-contained block-diagonal PSD-iff engine lemma for F2b is kernel-DISCHARGED: 0 errors, 0 sorries, #print axioms = [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]. Validated DISCHARGED by scripts/f2b_validate.py against the real kernel. This is F2b-M2, not full F2b — the Schrijver Theorem-1 block-diagonalization of the 2^n Terwilliger algebra remains the external round. Mathlib had the Schur-complement fromBlocks lemmas but no clean block-diagonal iff; this fills that gap inverse-free.
